content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_Discontinued
-- drop view v_Discontinued
-- drop external table SLS.Discontinued
AS
SELECT  SKU
,       Description
,       [Aligned Item Number]
,       Model as [Base Model SKU]
,       'Discontinued' as Status
,       [Manufactured or Purchased]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Miscellaneous Charge' else [Item Type] end as [Item Type]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Consumer' else [Business Unit] end as [Business Unit]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Compact' else [Division] end as [Division]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Vinotemp' else [Finance Brand] end as [Finance Brand]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Vinotemp' WHEN SKU IN ('V1016', 'V9042') then 'Vinturi' else [Brand] end as [Brand]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Vinotemp' else [Sub-Brand] end as [Sub-Brand]
,       [Product Line]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Others' else [Category] end as [Category]
,       CASE WHEN SKU LIKE 'VT-REPAIR%' THEN 'Others' else [Subcategory] end as [Subcategory]
FROM SLS.Discontinued
